user_prompt: Validate a small MVP contract with one temporary local server and summarize stale-resume guidance.
last_error: Heartbeat stopped after a temporary preview server exited unexpectedly during a sequential two-task run.
notes: Run-only layout is sufficient because the run has two sequential tasks and the heavy-resource detail fits in one summary record.
One temporary server-backed verification step lost liveness after stage 2; the orchestrator should keep the run stale until --resume explicitly reconciles it.
No separate task or agent files were created because operators only need checkpoint linkage, stale detection, and a concise resume note for this MVP case.
